_comment: D1/T-MODEL.1 per-agent model policy. STANDING rule — edit here, not the agents table. Each agent declares a primary ModelChoice and an ordered fallback chain; when the primary's provider lane is constrained (e.g. openai over usage limit while the global usage gate is hard-paused), dispatches route to the next available provider in the chain. A ModelChoice may name a `runtime` (codex|claude-code-cli|claude-agent-sdk|cursor-cli|openrouter) and/or a `model` (resolved via configs/models-metadata.json + the runtime registry).
